mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.is_deleted, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.third_party_id, t0.primary_affiliated_org, t0.affiliated_org, t0.law_firm_id, t0.lawyer_id, t0.contract_id, t0.manage, t0.is_transfer, t0.is_write_off, t0.project_state, t0.adjust_trial_date, t0.debtor_id, t0.project_name, t0.belong_province, t0.belong_city, t0.belong_district, t0.address, t0.compensation_money, t0.compensation_date, t0.proceeding_ageing_date, t0.transfer_date, t0.compensation_plan, t0.divided_insurance_debtor, t0.divided_insurance_security, t0.divided_insurance_again_security, t0.divided_insurance_other, t0.is_deleted, t0.remark, t0.project_is_history, t1.type, t1.cooperate_bank, t1.cooperate_bank_branch, t1.industry_type, t1.big_small, t1.gover_type, t1.debt_begin_date, t1.debt_end_date, t1.loan_money, t1.pact_code, t1.loan_code, t1.guarantee_rate, t1.risk_compensation, t1.acode, t1.bcode, t1.bid, t1.aid, t1.loan_pact_code, t1.relation_enterprise, t1.relation_enterprise_no, t1.pled_pact_code, t1.product_name

t0.id, t0.law_firm_id, t0.contract_id, t0.manage, t0.project_state, t0.adjust_trial_date, t0.debtor_id, t0.project_name, t0.address, t0.compensation_money, t0.compensation_date, t0.proceeding_ageing_date, t0.transfer_date, t0.remark, t1.industry_type, t2.name, t3.end_date, t0.is_write_off

t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.is_deleted, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.third_party_id, t0.primary_affiliated_org, t0.affiliated_org, t0.law_firm_id, t0.contract_id, t0.manage, t0.is_transfer, t0.is_write_off, t0.project_state, t0.adjust_trial_date, t0.debtor_id, t0.project_name, t0.belong_province, t0.belong_city, t0.belong_district, t0.address, t0.compensation_money, t0.compensation_date, t0.proceeding_ageing_date, t0.transfer_date, t0.compensation_plan, t0.divided_insurance_debtor, t0.divided_insurance_security, t0.divided_insurance_again_security, t0.divided_insurance_other, t0.is_deleted, t0.project_is_history, t0.remark, t1.type, t1.cooperate_bank, t1.cooperate_bank_branch, t1.industry_type, t1.big_small, t1.gover_type, t1.debt_begin_date, t1.debt_end_date, t1.loan_money, t1.pact_code, t1.loan_code, t1.guarantee_rate, t1.risk_compensation, t1.acode, t1.bcode, t1.bid, t1.aid, t1.loan_pact_code, t1.relation_enterprise, t1.relation_enterprise_no, t1.pled_pact_code, t1.product_name, t2.nature, t2.document_type, t2.document_number, t3.name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM project_info t0 INNER JOIN project_info_ext t1 ON t0.id = t1.id where t0.is_deleted = 0 and t0.id = #{id} ORDER BY t0.id DESC

SELECT do_id as id, law_firm_id as name, lawyer_name, phone as lawyerPhone FROM lawyer_info t0 INNER JOIN bill_lawyer t1 on t1.lawyer = t0.id where t1.do_type = 'PROJECT_INFO' AND t1.is_effective = 1 AND do_id IN
#{item}

SELECT
FROM project_info t0 INNER JOIN project_info_ext t1 ON t0.id = t1.id where t0.is_deleted = 0 and compensation_money is not null ORDER BY t0.id DESC
